title: hieracium atratum subsp. arrectipes
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. arrectipes is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as a type of hawkweed. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium atratum subsp. arrectipes include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
